pages.text: Resonant Cascade Alloy combines Industrial Cascade with tungsten carbide and diamond matrix steel. It is the late magic/precision alloy: bows, caster tools, and high-enchant gear love it.
Terminus Cascade Alloy combines Resonant Cascade, ender-netherite void alloy, and an Adamant Impact Core. Grade every ingredient you can, alloy, then grade the result before committing it to parts.

Best apex mining: Terminus Cascade or Infinite Singularity Core main, tungsten carbide tip, fluxwoven or conductive support, aluminum-lithium/Industrial Cascade rod, rubber grip. Best boss weapon: Terminus Cascade or Adamant Impact Core main, netherite/obsidian carbide tip, soulthread binding, Apotheosis damage gems.
